'''ât-zh-th-l''' ('''katazhtheloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chadmaxx|chadmaxx]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-zh-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chadmaxx|chadmaxx]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-zh-th-l
|-
! Lemma
| katazhtheloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitazhtheloko|thitazhtheloko]] || [[word:jitazhtheloko|jitazhtheloko]] || [[word:shitazhtheloko|shitazhtheloko]] || [[word:kitazhtheloko|kitazhtheloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutazhtheloko|thuthutazhtheloko]] || [[word:jujutazhtheloko|jujutazhtheloko]] || [[word:shushutazhtheloko|shushutazhtheloko]] || [[word:kukutazhtheloko|kukutazhtheloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutazhtheloko|thutazhtheloko]] || [[word:jutazhtheloko|jutazhtheloko]] || [[word:shutazhtheloko|shutazhtheloko]] || [[word:kutazhtheloko|kutazhtheloko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetazhtheloko|thetazhtheloko]] || [[word:jetazhtheloko|jetazhtheloko]] || [[word:shetazhtheloko|shetazhtheloko]] || [[word:ketazhtheloko|ketazhtheloko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotazhtheloko|thotazhtheloko]] || [[word:jotazhtheloko|jotazhtheloko]] || [[word:shotazhtheloko|shotazhtheloko]] || [[word:kotazhtheloko|kotazhtheloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotazhtheloko|thotazhtheloko]] || [[word:jotazhtheloko|jotazhtheloko]] || [[word:shotazhtheloko|shotazhtheloko]] || [[word:kotazhtheloko|kotazhtheloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtazhtheloko|thĂŠtazhtheloko]] || [[word:jĂŠtazhtheloko|jĂŠtazhtheloko]] || [[word:shĂŠtazhtheloko|shĂŠtazhtheloko]] || [[word:kĂŠtazhtheloko|kĂŠtazhtheloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatazhtheloko|thathatazhtheloko]] || [[word:jajatazhtheloko|jajatazhtheloko]] || [[word:shashatazhtheloko|shashatazhtheloko]] || [[word:kakatazhtheloko|kakatazhtheloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatazhtheloko|thatazhtheloko]] || [[word:jatazhtheloko|jatazhtheloko]] || [[word:shatazhtheloko|shatazhtheloko]] || [[word:katazhtheloko|katazhtheloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatazhtheloko|thatazhtheloko]] || [[word:jatazhtheloko|jatazhtheloko]] || [[word:shatazhtheloko|shatazhtheloko]] || [[word:katazhtheloko|katazhtheloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
